hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0

echo 'Context reminder after compaction: Primary color is #7b8cc4 (bg-primary). POC phase — no backend, no auth, mock data only (src/lib/mock-data.ts). All UI strings from translation files (ro.json/ru.json). Run pnpm type-check before claiming any task complete.'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Forever Clean"' 2>/dev/null; exit 0

hooks.prompt: Review what was just completed. Check: (1) Was pnpm type-check run and did it pass? (2) Were relevant tests run and passing? (3) If UI was changed, was the dev server checked or a screenshot taken? (4) Are there any hardcoded hex colors or Romanian/Russian strings that slipped in? If all checks pass, respond {"ok": true}. If any check fails or was skipped, respond {"ok": false, "reason": "<what still needs to be done>"} so Claude continues.
